title: Resto Shift SMS Board
tagline: Last-minute shift coverage via SMS for Montreal restaurants hit by labour shortages.

jtbd.situation: When a cook calls in sick on a Grand Prix weekend shift
jtbd.persona: Manager at Old Port restaurant relying on TFW staff
jtbd.motivation: blast available shifts to trusted part-time pool via SMS
jtbd.outcome: stay open without cutting hours Fri-Sun
jtbd.statement: When staff call in sick, an Old Port manager wants SMS shift blasts so they keep weekend service open.

montrealAngle: ARQ warns restaurants may open Fri-Sun only due to 10% TFW cap; Kwizinn Old Port uses 20% TFW for stability.
whyNow: Federal TFW cap + Quebec immigration cuts hitting Montreal hospitality Oct 2025.

competitors.name: WhatsApp groups
competitors.notes: Free but chaotic; no audit trail or shift tracking.

competitors.name: 7shifts
competitors.notes: Full scheduling suite; overkill for 7-day MVP wedge.

mvpScope.coreJob: Post open shift, notify staff pool via SMS, first-accept wins
mvpScope.conciergeFallback: Manager texts manually; product tracks acceptances in Airtable

businessModel.firstCustomer: Kwizinn or similar Old Port resto

g1_montrealAnchor.notes: Montreal hospitality labour crisis acute vs other cities.
